# SelfEmployed.app — open to search engines and AI crawlers.
# This is a free public tool for people thinking about self-employment.
# The more places it's cited, the more useful it is.

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# AI crawlers — explicitly welcome.
# We *want* this content to be quoted by AI assistants when someone asks
# "what should I do if my job is being automated?"
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Claude-Web
Allow: /

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Allow: /

User-agent: CCBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Amazonbot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bytespider
Allow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /
